channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 agents-io/PokeClaw (329 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: agents-io

📝 Repository: agents-io/PokeClaw

📄 Descrizione: PokeClaw (PocketClaw) — first on-device AI that controls your Android phone. Gemma 4, no cloud, no API key. Poke is short for Pocket.

⭐ Stelle: 329

🍴 Forks: 44

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: accessibility ai-agent android-automation gemma4 litert local-llm on-device-ai open-source phone-agent pocketclaw pokeclaw tool-calling

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-06T08:31:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-09T03:50:42Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

🍴 Forks: 0

item.title: 📝 jegly/OfflineLLM (16 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jegly

📝 Repository: jegly/OfflineLLM

📄 Descrizione: A privacy-first Android chat app that runs large language models entirely on-device. No internet, no cloud, no tracking. Built with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and llama.cpp with optimized ARM NEON/SVE inference.

⭐ Stelle: 16

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: ai-android-app android android-ai android-ai-app android-llm artificial-intelligence edge-ai gemma4 llamacpp llm local-ai local-llm local-llm-android ml offlinellm on-device-ai private-ai-assistant private-local-ai qwen3-5

📜 Licenza: No license

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-08T12:36:23Z

item.title: 📝 mamon-aburawi/Printer-KMP (12 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mamon-aburawi

📝 Repository: mamon-aburawi/Printer-KMP

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) library for ESC/POS thermal receipt printers. Supports USB/TCP connections, Android & Desktop (JVM) targets, and seamless Jetpack Compose UI capturing, this library have been tested with xprinter xp-80c

⭐ Stelle: 12

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android cmp desktop eps esc-pos escpos escpos-printer jvm kmp pos-printers printer printer-kmp thermal-printer

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-30T19:09:19Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-05T04:08:41Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
